hero.subtitle: KeeperLog is the structured care documentation system for reptile keepers. Replace scattered notes with a real record of your animals' lives.

features.label: What you can track
features.title: Structured care for every animal
features.subtitle: Feedings, sheddings, weights, vet visits, photos, and more — all in one structured record per animal.

careLog.title: Care Journal
careLog.desc: Log feedings, sheddings, weights, and vet visits in seconds. Look back anytime and see the full picture of your animal's health.

history.title: Animal History
history.desc: A complete timeline for every animal. See trends, spot problems, and never forget when you last fed, weighed, or checked on them.

publicProfiles.title: Public Profiles
publicProfiles.desc: Share your animals with the world. Public profiles with photos, care stats, and a shareable link — perfect for breeders, vets, or fellow keepers.

product.label: See it in action
product.title: Built for real keeping routines
product.desc: KeeperLog shows you everything about your animals at a glance — recent feedings, weight trends, shed cycles, and upcoming vet visits.

trust.label: Why you can trust it
trust.title: Built with care, built for keepers

privacy.title: Your data, your control
privacy.desc: Encrypted storage, no third-party tracking, and full GDPR data export. Your animals' data stays yours.

keeper.title: Built by a keeper
keeper.desc: Not a corporation. KeeperLog was built by a reptile keeper who needed this tool — and made it real.

free.title: Free to start
free.desc: No credit card, no trial. Create your account and start documenting immediately.

register.desc: Create your free account in seconds. No credit card, no setup hassle — just sign up and you're in.

addAnimals.title: Add Your Animals

home.title: KeeperLog — Care Documentation for Reptile Keepers
home.description: Track feedings, sheddings, weights, and vet visits for all your reptiles. Structured care documentation — replace scattered notes with real records.

register.description: Create your free KeeperLog account — start documenting feedings, sheddings, weights, and vet visits for your reptiles today.

features.title: Features — KeeperLog
features.description: Everything KeeperLog offers: care journal, animal history, public profiles, weight charts, photo galleries, health tracking, and more.

whyKeeperlog.title: Why KeeperLog — Replace Spreadsheets & Guesswork
whyKeeperlog.description: Why reptile keepers choose KeeperLog over spreadsheets, sticky notes, and memory. Structured care documentation that actually works.

faq.title: FAQ — KeeperLog
faq.description: Frequently asked questions about KeeperLog. Is it free? What animals can I track? How safe is my data?

compare.title: Excel vs KeeperLog — Reptile Care Tracking Compared
compare.description: See how KeeperLog compares to spreadsheets for tracking reptile care. Visual charts, reminders, public profiles, and more.

hero.label: Everything you can do
hero.title: What KeeperLog offers
hero.desc: A structured system for documenting care, tracking health, and sharing your animals — built by a keeper, for keepers.

careJournal.title: Care Journal
careJournal.desc: Log feedings, sheddings, weights, and vet visits with just a few taps. Every event is timestamped and stored permanently. Look back at any animal's complete care history whenever you need it.

items.feedings: Track every feeding with prey type, size, and acceptance
items.sheddings: Record each shed with quality and completeness notes
items.weights: Log weight regularly and see trends over time
items.vetVisits: Document vet appointments, diagnoses, and costs
items.notes: Add husbandry notes for anything else worth remembering

animalManagement.title: Animal Management
animalManagement.desc: Each animal gets its own profile with species, morph, gender, birthdate, and a photo gallery. Manage enclosures, assign animals, and keep everything connected.

items.profiles: Detailed profiles per animal with photo, species, and morph
items.enclosures: Track enclosures and assign animals to them
items.photos: Upload and organize photo galleries per animal
items.documents: Attach documents like vet records or certificates

publicProfiles.title: Public Profiles
publicProfiles.desc: Share your animals publicly with a custom URL. Public profiles show photos, care stats, and a bio — ideal for breeders, rescue handovers, or simply showing off your collection to fellow keepers.

items.customUrl: Custom shareable URL for each animal and keeper
items.careStats: Visible care statistics build trust with anyone who visits
items.community: Likes and comments from other keepers
items.embed: Embeddable profile widgets for forums or websites

healthTracking.title: Health & Weight Tracking
healthTracking.desc: Visual weight charts, shedding cycle tracking, and vet visit records give you a clear view of each animal's health over time. Spot problems early and keep a solid record for your vet.

items.weightCharts: Visual weight progression charts per animal
items.vetRecords: Complete vet visit history with cost tracking
items.reminders: Feeding and vet reminders so you never forget

planning.title: Planning & Reminders
planning.desc: A weekly planner and automated reminders help you stay on top of feeding schedules, vet appointments, and enclosure maintenance — without having to remember everything yourself.

items.weeklyPlanner: Visual weekly planner for all your animals

monitoring.title: Climate Monitoring
monitoring.desc: Optionally connect temperature and humidity sensors to monitor your enclosures around the clock. Get alerts when conditions leave safe ranges. Works with DHT22, BME280, and Home Assistant.

items.sensors: Support for DHT22, BME280, and Home Assistant sensors
items.alerts: Telegram alerts when climate conditions are off
items.history: Sensor data logged and viewable over time
items.dashboard: Real-time dashboard for all connected enclosures

cta.title: Ready to get started?
cta.desc: Create your free account and start documenting your animals' care today.

hero.label: Why switch
hero.title: Your animals deserve better than a spreadsheet
hero.desc: Most keepers track care with spreadsheets, sticky notes, or memory. It works — until it doesn't. KeeperLog gives you a real system that grows with your collection.

memory.title: When was the last feeding?
memory.desc: You think it was Tuesday. Or was it Monday? With multiple animals, memory becomes unreliable fast.

scattered.title: Notes everywhere, overview nowhere
scattered.desc: A spreadsheet here, a note there, a photo somewhere in your camera roll. No single source of truth.

handover.title: Proving your care is hard
handover.desc: Vet visit coming up? Selling an animal? Good luck compiling months of care data from scattered notes.

forgetting.title: Important things slip through
forgetting.desc: Vet appointments, medication schedules, deworming — the things you can't afford to forget are the easiest to miss.

onePlace.title: Everything in one place
onePlace.desc: Every feeding, shed, weight, vet visit, and note — per animal, searchable, permanent.

trends.title: See trends over time
trends.desc: Weight charts, shedding cycles, feeding history — spot problems early instead of reacting late.

shareProof.title: Share and prove your care
shareProof.desc: Public profiles with real data. Show your vet, a buyer, or fellow keepers a complete care record.

neverForget.title: Never forget again
neverForget.desc: Reminders for feedings, vet visits, and maintenance. The system remembers so you don't have to.

cta.title: Try it. It's free.
cta.desc: No commitment. No credit card. Just a better way to track your animals' care.

hero.title: Frequently Asked Questions
hero.desc: Quick answers about KeeperLog — what it does, what it costs, and how your data is handled.

free.a: Yes. KeeperLog has a free tier that lets you track your animals without paying anything. Premium tiers with more features are available if you want them.

animals.a: Any. KeeperLog was built for reptile keepers, but the tracking system works for any animal — snakes, geckos, tortoises, amphibians, or anything else you keep.

dataSafe.a: Yes. All uploaded files are encrypted at rest, passwords are hashed with PBKDF2 + SHA-512, and there is no third-party tracking. You can export and delete your data at any time.

sensors.q: Do I need sensors or special hardware?
sensors.a: No. Sensors are completely optional. The core of KeeperLog is care documentation — feedings, sheds, weights, vet visits. Climate monitoring is an extra feature, not a requirement.

publicProfiles.q: Can I share my animal profiles publicly?
publicProfiles.a: Yes. You can create public profiles for your animals with custom URLs. Choose what to show — photos, weight, feeding data, species info — and share the link with anyone.

export.a: Yes. KeeperLog supports full GDPR-compliant data export. You can download all your data at any time from the settings page.

mobile.q: Does it work on my phone?
mobile.a: Yes. KeeperLog is a responsive web app that works on any device with a browser. No app store download needed.

whoBuilt.a: KeeperLog was built by a reptile keeper who needed a proper tracking system and couldn't find one. It's a passion project that became a real product.

cta.title: Still have questions?
cta.desc: Create a free account and see for yourself — or reach out if something isn't covered here.

hero.label: Comparison
hero.title: Excel vs KeeperLog
hero.desc: Spreadsheets work. Until you have 5 animals, 200 feedings, and a vet asking for a care summary. Here's how they compare.

feedingLog.label: Feeding log
feedingLog.keeperlog: Structured entries with prey type, size, and notes

weightTracking.label: Weight tracking
weightTracking.keeperlog: Automatic visual weight charts per animal

honest.title: When a spreadsheet is fine
honest.desc: If you keep one animal and rarely need to look back, a simple spreadsheet might be all you need. No shame in that.
honest.desc2: As soon as you have multiple animals, want visual trends, need to share records, or just want to stop forgetting things — a dedicated system pays off.

cta.title: Ready to upgrade from spreadsheets?
cta.desc: Start with a free account. Your animals' data deserves a real system.
